summary: Created PendingRequestsSection and PendingRequestRow components. Section renders above Members in GroupDetailView (admin-only, conditional on pending requests). Approve calls inviteByNpub then removes request from IDB and decrements bell. Deny removes request and decrements bell. Error handling for failed approvals shown inline. pendingRequests state, loadPendingRequestsForGroup, approveJoinRequest, denyJoinRequest wired through MarmotContext. i18n strings added in en/de.
